title: Directional Subtitles
description: Shows subtitles in a circular formation, based on the direction that the sound is coming from!
body:
# Directional Subtitles
Shows subtitles in a circular formation based on the direction that the sound is coming from!

## Requires [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)!

Configurable using [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) / [Cloth Config](https://modrinth.com/mod/cloth-config)!

Configuration:
- Change position and radius of the center of the circle (or anchor to hotbar or screen center)
- Change the lifetime of the subtitles (how long a subtitle stays on screen for)
- Toggle subtitles for footsteps
